production_note: agentic_K1 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-034-1A", **{'tp': 1, 'fp': 1, 'fn': 0, 'accuracy_only': False}}
meets_contract = record["accuracy_only"] is False
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_ACCURACY_ONLY"
print("S34-T1-A", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Del instruction y hints del packet completo el contrato de S34-T1-A-E1; pista: Relaciona los campos `tp, fp, fn, accuracy_only` con la regla explicada en S34-T1-A..
Según theory/starter del slim_packet en S34-T1-A-E2, dejo la salida contractual. Hint: Primero se calcula `missing`; ningún acceso a tp debe ocurrir antes de esa rama..
Exploro el fixture sintético de S34-T1-A-E3 y aplico solo el TODO/defecto del paquete. Una ausencia no equivale a breach: enrútala a `REQUEST_CONFUSION` antes de evaluar el contenido..

exercises.code:
record = {"case_id": "CASO-LIM-034-1B", **{'precision_at_k': 0.667, 'load': 8, 'capacity': 10}}
meets_contract = not (record["load"] > record["capacity"])
status = "PASS" if meets_contract else "REJECT_QUEUE_OVERLOAD"
print("S34-T1-B", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints + starter de S34-T1-B-E1: implemento el print/predicado del contrato. Pista: Relaciona los campos `precision_at_k, load, capacity` con la regla explicada en S34-T1-B..
